completionModal.title: Level Complete! 🎉
completionModal.assistedBody: Buddy built this one for you, so it's not counted as a real win yet — no stars, no XP. Reset the level and solve it yourself to earn real credit!

progress.title: Your Progress

dailyChallengeNote: Daily Challenge remixes levels you've already learned with new numbers — it's practice, not new lessons.
